---
title: Get Data Product Spec Tool
description: Retrieve a data product's specification as JSON.
---

import { Aside } from '@astrojs/starlight/components';

# Get Data Product Spec Tool

This tool fetches the raw specification of a data product as JSON. Use it when an agent needs the structured definition of a data product rather than its data.

## When to use it

Add this tool to an agent that reasons about a data product's definition, for example when revising or documenting it.

## Parameters

| Parameter | Required | Type | Suggested scope | What it does |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `data_product_id` | Yes | string | User input | The data product to fetch. |
| `data_product_version` | No | string | Fixed or User input | A specific version. If omitted, the current version is returned. |

<Aside type="note">
See [Configuring tool parameters](/agent-studio-docs/build/tools/configuring-tools/#configuring-tool-parameters) for what the scope column means.
</Aside>

## Example usage

```jsonc
{
  "data_product_id": "my-data-product",
  "data_product_version": "v1"
}
```

## See also

- https://developer.alation.com/dev/reference/get_data_product
- https://developer.alation.com/dev/reference/get_data_product_version
